title: ImmutableNodeProfile
description: A SourceOS immutable-node profile tying together boot/release references, host capability placements, durable state schemas, validation entrypoints, and optional Socios capability-pack posture.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. 2.2.0.

channel.description: Realization channel such as linux-dev, linux-stable, m2-asahi-dev, or fog-node.

hostMutationPosture.description: Allowed host mutation posture for this profile.

sociosRequired.description: Base SourceOS immutable nodes must not require Socios enrollment. Optional Socios packs are modeled separately.

bootReleaseSetRef.description: Optional BootReleaseSet or boot/recovery handoff reference.

workstationProfileRef.description: Optional WorkstationProfile reference for desktop/workstation realization.

agentMachineProfileRef.description: Optional Agent Machine or AgentPod profile reference for local runtime realization.

hostCapabilityPlacementRefs.description: References to HostCapabilityPlacement objects used by this profile.

nodeStateSchemaRefs.description: References to NodeStateSchema objects used by this profile.

optionalSociosCapabilityPackRefs.description: Optional Socios capability pack references. Presence does not imply base node dependency or enrollment.

validation.description: Operator-facing dry-run, validation, inspection, and evidence entrypoints.

policyRefs.description: Policy references that govern activation, mutation, enrollment, or rollback.

evidenceRefs.description: Evidence or receipt references expected from this node profile.
